Notifications.OnlyGems: Only socket-compatible items can be inserted.
Notifications.GemIncompatible: That item is not compatible with this socket.
Notifications.CannotOpenGem: Could not open the gem item.
Notifications.GemRequiresSocket: This gem must be socketed before it can be used.
Notifications.HostNotSocketable: This item type cannot receive sockets.
Notifications.SocketConditionFailed: That gem does not meet this socket's requirements.
Notifications.SocketConditionError: This socket condition could not be evaluated.

GemTargetTypes.Label: Allowed Item Types
GemTargetTypes.Hint: Choose which item subtypes can receive this gem.

GemDetails.Hint: Choose how this gem should be categorized.
GemDetails.Disclaimer: Use the fields below to adjust attacks and damage made with the item that holds this gem (including spells). Active Effects applied to the actor affect all eligible attacks globally. For armor and shields, use the gem's standard Active Effects on the item.

ExtraDamage.Label: Extra Damage
ExtraDamage.Hint: Add one or more extra damage entries applied when this gem is socketed into weapons or spells.
ExtraDamage.ActivityHint: Choose when this extra damage applies. Any action: always. Attack only: only on attack-type activities. Spell only: only when socketed into a spell item.

CritDamage.Label: Critical-Only Damage
CritDamage.Hint: Damage that only applies when this gem is socketed and you roll critical damage (button or crit action).

CritThreshold.Label: Critical Threshold
CritThreshold.Hint: Lowest d20 result that counts as a critical hit for attack rolls with this gem socketed. If multiple gems adjust crit, the lowest value is used. Leave blank to use the default value.

CritMultiplier.Label: Critical Multiplier
CritMultiplier.Hint: Multiply critical damage by this value when this gem is socketed. If multiple gems set this, the highest value is used. Leave blank to keep the default multiplier.

AttackBonus.Label: Attack Bonus
AttackBonus.Hint: Flat bonus added to attack rolls when this gem is socketed. Bonuses from multiple gems stack. Leave blank for none.

ItemDetails.EnableSocketTabHint: Show the Sockets tab on this item when the global display setting is disabled.
ItemDetails.EnableSocketTabLockedHint: Items that already have sockets keep this option enabled until all sockets are removed.

SocketSlotConfig.Title: Socket Slot Settings
SocketSlotConfig.Subtitle: Configure rules, description, and tint for this slot.
SocketSlotConfig.InspectHint: Opens the socketed gem in read-only mode.
SocketSlotConfig.NoGem: No gem is currently socketed in this slot.

Condition.Label: Slot condition
Condition.Hint: Use JavaScript. Available variables: gem, gemItem, hostItem, item, actor, user, slot, slotConfig, slotIndex, source, getProperty, hasProperty, deepClone.

Description.Label: Slot description
Description.Hint: Shown in Socket Descriptions while the slot is empty. When a gem is added, the gem description takes over.

Color.Label: Slot color
Color.Hint: Applied only to the empty socket frame.

Validation.InvalidCondition: The slot condition has invalid code.

Tooltips.RemoveGem: Remove the gem from this socket.
Tooltips.DeleteSocket: Delete this slot from the item.

EditPermission.Name: Edit Socket Permission
EditPermission.Hint: The minimum role required to add or remove sockets from items.

SocketableItemTypes.Name: Socketable Item Types
SocketableItemTypes.Label: Configure Socketable Item Types
SocketableItemTypes.Hint: Choose which item types can receive sockets.
SocketableItemTypes.Title: Socketable Item Types
SocketableItemTypes.SelectLabel: Item types that can receive sockets
SocketableItemTypes.SelectHint: Choose one or more item types.

MaxSockets.Name: Maximum Number of Sockets per Item
MaxSockets.Hint: Maximum number of sockets an item can have. Use -1 for unlimited.

DeleteOnRemoval.Name: Delete Gem on Removal
DeleteOnRemoval.Hint: If enabled, a gem is destroyed when removed from a socket; otherwise it's returned to the player's inventory.

GemLootSubtypes.Name: Gem Loot Subtypes
GemLootSubtypes.Label: Configure Gem Loot Subtypes
GemLootSubtypes.Hint: Select which loot subtypes count as gems and customize the extra subtype label.
GemLootSubtypes.Title: Gem Loot Subtype Settings
GemLootSubtypes.SelectHint: Items with these loot subtypes will be treated as gems.

Selection.Name: Gem Loot Subtypes
Selection.Label: Configure Gem Loot Subtypes
Selection.Hint: Select which loot subtypes count as gems.
Selection.Title: Gem Loot Subtype Settings
Selection.SelectHint: Items with these loot subtypes will be treated as gems.

CustomMenu.Name: Custom Loot Subtypes
CustomMenu.Label: Configure Custom Loot Subtypes
CustomMenu.Hint: Add custom loot subtype keys and labels that can be used as gems.
CustomMenu.Title: Custom Loot Subtypes

Custom.Heading: Custom loot subtypes
Custom.Hint: Add new loot subtype keys and labels that will be available for gems.
Custom.Label: Display label

GemRollLayout.Name: Gem damage layout in roll dialog
GemRollLayout.Hint: Enable the grouped-by-gem layout in the damage roll configuration dialog.

SocketTabLayout.Name: Socket tab layout
SocketTabLayout.Hint: Choose how the sockets tab is displayed.

EnableSocketTabForAllItems.Name: Enable Socket Tab on all items
EnableSocketTabForAllItems.Hint: If enabled, the Sockets tab appears on every socketable item. If disabled, it must be enabled per item in Details.

SupportMenu.Name: Support the developer
SupportMenu.Label: Patreon support
SupportMenu.Hint: Get access to SC - More Gems with 120+ gems, and more every month. We are also building SC - Setforge to create item sets.

DocumentationMenu.Name: Documentation
DocumentationMenu.Label: Open wiki
DocumentationMenu.Hint: Open the SC - Simple Sockets documentation wiki.

SocketBehaviorMenu.Name: Socket settings
SocketBehaviorMenu.Label: Configure socket settings
SocketBehaviorMenu.Hint: Open a dedicated window for socket permissions, limits, gem handling, and layout options.
SocketBehaviorMenu.Description: Manage socket permissions, limits, and display behavior in one place.

Sections.RulesHint: Control who can edit sockets and how gems behave when attached or removed.
Sections.DisplayHint: Adjust how gem damage and the socket tab are presented in the UI.

HideSupportCard.Name: Hide automatic support message until next update
HideSupportCard.Hint: After the support card appears once for the current version, this option is checked automatically. Uncheck it if you want the card to appear whenever the world loads.

SupportCard.Description: Support my work and stay up to date with exclusive modules and development progress.
SupportCard.Intro: Support us on Patreon to help us keep creating.
SupportCard.Exclusive: Get access to the exclusive SC - More Gems module with 120+ gems and monthly updates. We are also building SC - Setforge so you can create item sets.
SupportCard.Footer: This chat card will only be shown once. Enable it again in the settings if needed.

DeleteSocket.Title: Delete Socket
DeleteSocket.Message: Are you sure you want to delete this socket?
DeleteSocket.Hint: Hold Shift to bypass this prompt.

RemoveGem.Title: Remove Gem
RemoveGem.Message: Are you sure you want to remove the gem from this slot?

AddSocket.SelectPrompt: Click an item to add a socket. Press Esc to cancel.
AddSocket.NoPermission: You do not have permission to add sockets.
AddSocket.ItemPermissionBody: You do not have permission to edit {name}.
AddSocket.MaxReachedBody: {name} already has {count} socket(s), which is the maximum allowed ({max}).
AddSocket.SelectAnother: Do you want to select another item?
AddSocket.Error: Failed to add socket. See console for details.
